name: GLM-4.5-Air
metaDescription: GLM-4.5-Air (Z.ai (Zhipu / GLM)), released 2025-07-28 — part of the GLM Air line. Compact sibling of GLM-4.5: 106B total / 12B active MoE, 128K context, MIT li…
overview: GLM-4.5-Air is a large language model from Z.ai (Zhipu / GLM), part of the GLM Air line. Released 2025-07-28. Mid-size, more compact open-weight GLM variant balancing capability and efficiency.
What's notable in this version: Compact sibling of GLM-4.5: 106B total / 12B active MoE, 128K context, MIT license; near-flagship quality at much lower cost.
